LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE APRIL-23-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF SERGEY CHUSHKIN'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. OFF CALENDAR. THE TARASENKO DECLARATION INDICATES PARTIES DID NOT MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON, BY PHONE, OR BY VIDEO CONFERENCE, AS REQUIRED BY CCP 430.41. PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH THE CODE. RESPONSIVE PLEADINGS ARE NOW DUE BY MAY 23, 2024. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)
